summary: Iteration 59: Download Debug Snapshot feature tests completed. All 15 backend tests pass. Frontend UI verified - Export Snapshot and Copy to Clipboard buttons are visible on Lifecycle tab, and file download works correctly with filename format snapshot-YYYY-MM-DD-HHMM.json. The /api/debug/ui-snapshot endpoint requires NO auth key (read-only internal use), while /api/debug/state-snapshot requires X-Debug-Snapshot-Key header. Snapshot JSON contains all required keys: freshness, positions, position_counts, lifecycle, entry_quality, pnl_summary, strategy_health, weather_config.

integration_issues.issue: Clipboard copy fails in automated testing due to secure context requirements. This is expected behavior - navigator.clipboard requires HTTPS/secure context which works in real browsers but may fail in headless automation
integration_issues.priority: LOW - Expected behavior, not a bug

backend_api_tests: GET /api/debug/ui-snapshot returns JSON with all required keys - PASS
GET /api/debug/state-snapshot returns 403 when no key provided - PASS
GET /api/debug/state-snapshot returns 403 with wrong key - PASS
GET /api/debug/state-snapshot works with X-Debug-Snapshot-Key header - PASS
Freshness contains snapshot_at with valid ISO timestamp - PASS
Freshness contains required fields (snapshot_version, server_start_time, uptime_seconds, etc.) - PASS
position_counts key present and accurate - PASS
pnl_summary contains total_realized, total_unrealized, total, open_positions - PASS
Lifecycle contains mode, config, and exit_candidates_detail - PASS
strategy_health contains weather, crypto_sniper, arb_scanner - PASS
entry_quality contains rejections and passed_signals stats - PASS
Snapshot JSON size is reasonable (<200KB) - PASS

Copy button (data-testid='snapshot-copy-btn') visible on Lifecycle tab - PASS
Export Snapshot button triggers file download - PASS
Downloaded filename matches format snapshot-YYYY-MM-DD-HHMM.json - PASS

details: No authentication required (internal UI use only)
Returns same data as keyed endpoint via shared _build_state_snapshot() helper
Returns 403 when no key or wrong key provided
All data is read-only, no trading logic triggered

ui_copy_button.location: Next to Export Snapshot button on Lifecycle tab
details: Changes to checkmark on successful copy
Uses zero-padded month, day, hours, minutes

seed_data_creation: None - tested with live MongoDB data (54 weather + 11 crypto + 21 arb positions)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 59 verified Download Debug Snapshot feature. Key findings: (1) Two endpoints exist - /api/debug/ui-snapshot (no auth required, used by UI) and /api/debug/state-snapshot (requires X-Debug-Snapshot-Key header). Both return identical data via shared _build_state_snapshot() helper. (2) Frontend has SnapshotExport component on Lifecycle tab with Export Snapshot button (triggers download) and Copy button (copies to clipboard). (3) Downloaded filename format: snapshot-YYYY-MM-DD-HHMM.json. (4) Snapshot JSON contains 8 top-level keys: freshness, positions, position_counts, lifecycle, entry_quality, pnl_summary, strategy_health, weather_config. (5) Snapshot is read-only and triggers no trading logic. (6) Typical snapshot size is ~40-50KB.
